title: Great Elevator
description: A lightweight elevator mod that allows players to travel between floors instantly using elevator pads.
body:
# Great Elevator
# 
Great Elevator adds a simple and efficient elevator system to Minecraft that allows players to travel vertically between floors using elevator pads.
It is designed to be lightweight, easy to use, and perfect for bases, towers, and underground structures.


## Features
Simple elevator pad system for vertical travel
Instant teleport between elevator pads
Works in survival and creative mode
Lightweight and optimized for performance
Easy to integrate into any base or building
Supports multiplayer servers
How it works

Place elevator pads above or below each other.
Stand on the pad and jump to go up or sneak to go down.


## Use cases
## 
This mod is perfect for:

Towers
Underground bases
Large buildings
Multiplayer servers
Vertical transport systems


## Compatibility
## 
Works with most modpacks and multiplayer servers.



 Support the Project:
